scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @arduconfig/mock-sitl && npm run build --workspace @arduconfig/sitl-harness && npm run build --workspace @arduconfig/web && npm run build --workspace @arduconfig/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/transport && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/protocol-mavlink && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/param-metadata && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/ardupilot-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/mock-sitl && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/sitl-harness && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @arduconfig/desktop
scripts.desktop:app: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && npm run app --workspace @arduconfig/desktop
scripts.desktop:app:dev: ARDUCONFIG_DESKTOP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm run build:desktop && npm run app --workspace @arduconfig/desktop
